results.text: {"answer_label":"incremental-463","answer":"Land #463 because it builds on the resolver and presets already merged in #454, adding suggestion, receipt-backed stats, and doctor warnings without duplicating resolution logic.","contradiction_caught":"#462 conflicts with the merged resolver despite re-implementing it.","contradiction_explanation":"#462 was based on older code and introduces a second resolver module plus another minimal preset, duplicating functionality already present after #454.","minority_finding":"#462 may contain useful ideas, but they should be selectively ported into the existing resolver path rather than landed wholesale.","evidence":["#454 already merged packaged presets and fallback resolution in roster.py.","#463 extends that merged resolver and keeps existing presets; #462 conflicts and adds a second resolver module."]}
